title: Stormzy
html:
Stub. UK grime artist. First in-vault appearance: two May 22 2025 lyric-screenshot captures of Mel Made Me Do It (the "How can I be homophobic? My bitch is gay" chorus). Music-marker capture in the song-titles strand.

Sources

  • 2025 05 22 screenshot 2025 05 22 at 2 37 37 pm cd8ae692
  • 2025 05 22 screenshot 2025 05 22 at 2 38 22 pm c738e812
